memory.description: Persistent knowledge graph across Claude sessions (entities, relations, observations). Stores long-lived project facts: auth rules (AUTH_MODEL v2), RBAC decisions, known bugs, deploy workflow, business constants.

env._comment: @modelcontextprotocol/server-memory resolves non-absolute MEMORY_FILE_PATH relative to its own dist folder in npm-cache, NOT to process.cwd(). An absolute path is therefore required. Windows dev machines use the line below; Linux/Mac devs should replace with their own absolute path pointing at <repo-root>/.claude/memory.jsonl. The memory file is git-ignored — one file per developer machine.

code-graph.description: AST + SQLite FTS5 knowledge graph of the XCH codebase — semantic search, call graph, impact analysis, HTTP route tracing. Auto-indexes the repo on first run into .code-graph/index.db.
